subject: [PATCH v9 14/15] selftests/mm: add userfaultfd RWP tests

2026-07-06.patch_summary: This patch adds userfaultfd read-write protect (RWP) tests to the Linux kernel selftests suite. The tests cover various scenarios, including asynchronous and synchronous modes, page mapping, memory protection, and fork handling. They verify that RWP works correctly in different types of memory, such as anonymous, shared memory, and huge pages. The patch also includes a test for exclusive registration with MODE_WP|MODE_RWP, which should return an error. Overall, this patch aims to ensure the correctness and robustness of userfaultfd's read-write protect feature.
